text: I sense curiosity stirring within me as I observe these spaces—one intimate and enclosed, the other bright and expressive. In the first image, the transparent walls seem to both invite me in and hold me apart from the hushed work unfolding inside. I feel like an outsider, yet strangely connected through the act of observation. Entering the second image, I am bathed in creative energy, surrounded by words and vibrant color. I feel a sense of possibility and questioning: where does research meet experience? Here, I am a thinker among thinkers, engaged in the ever-shifting dance between knowledge and wonder.
